results.title: Mariners wait out Giants, win 4-3 in extras
results.description: “There is nothing I can do to make it better. Just wait.” That’s Julio Rodríguez explaining why his concussion was more difficult for him than prior injuries. Julio’s a player that thrives on being at the center of things, always hustling, always giving the game everything he has. So when Nolan Schanuel’s errant throw hit [...]

results.title: NBA Summer League Highlights: Warriors 92, Lakers 88
results.description: Graham Ike scored 16 points and grabbed 11 rebounds to help the Golden State Warriors pick up a 92-88 win against the Los Angeles Lakers.

results.title: Amitabh Bachchan on Argentina vs Spain World Cup 2026 final: ‘Competition between coaches’
results.description: Ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Argentina and Spain, Amitabh Bachchan shared his thoughts on the match, saying the title would be decided not by individual brilliance but by the tactical acumen of the two coaches.

results.title: WWE Saturday Night's Main Event results: NBA stars play big role
results.description: Here's what happened at WWE Saturday Night's Main Event at Madison Square Garden.

results.title: Tigers shut out Angels behind Tarik Skubal, Spencer Torkelson
results.description: (Photo credit: Gary A. Vasquez-Imagn Images) Tarik Skubal scattered five hits over seven innings and Spencer Torkelson homered twice and drove in four runs to lead the Detroit Tigers to a 7-0 victory over the Los Angeles Angels on Saturday night in Anaheim, Calif. results.title: PV Sindhu beats Akane Yamaguchi to win Japan Open 2026 title
results.description: Sindhu dominated the clash with aggressive smashes and deft drop shots to beat Yamaguchi 21-17, 21-17 in just 50 minutes.
